Home / Blog / What beginner pickleball players need to stop doing, to start winning.

What beginner pickleball players need to stop doing, to start winning.

By Billy Walters • 4/22/2024
blog pickleball-videos

Key insights

  • 🏓 Beginners need to stop mindlessly following instructions and start understanding the purpose behind each stroke in pickleball.
  • 🏓 Mindlessly driving the ball without dropping accomplishes nothing and makes it easy for opponents to simply block the ball, hindering progress in the game.
  • 🚫 Many players mistakenly think they’re not allowed to step into the kitchen in pickleball, but you can actually stand in there and dink the ball while standing inside.
  • 🎾 Stop thinking that drives are bad in pickleball, they can actually be effective for your third shots.
  • 🎾 Placement over power is key in pickleball, aiming for the opponent\’s dominant hip can put them in a difficult position and give you an advantage.
  • 🎾 The key to winning in pickleball is to choose the shot that is most high percentage for you as an individual player.
  • 🎾 The most high percentage shot in pickleball is to hit the ball up the line, giving the opponent less time to react.
  • 🎾 Hitting to the better player and facing weaknesses can lead to improvement and opportunities to play with higher-rated players.
Beginners in pickleball need to focus on understanding the purpose behind each stroke, prioritize placement over power, and choose high percentage shots to improve their game.
  • 00:00 🏓 Beginner pickleball players need to understand the importance of purposeful strokes, dinking, and dropping the ball to set up for an attack.
  • 01:28 🏓 Get closer to the net, practice dinking and dropping the ball short to improve your pickleball game and advance to higher levels of play.
  • 04:03 🏓 Use drives in pickleball for third shots and focus on placement for a good fifth shot drop.
  • 05:31 🎾 Aim for your opponent\’s dominant hip to put them in an awkward position and create opportunities for winning shots.
  • 06:42 🏓 Beginner pickleball players need to focus on hitting the right shots and being in the right position on the court to start winning.
  • 08:10 🏓 Positioning and strategy are crucial in pickleball, covering respective sides and anticipating opponents\’ shots to increase chances of winning.
  • 10:37 🏓 Hit high percentage shots up the line, avoid inconsistent long distance hits, and communicate with your partner to cover the middle and line, to improve your pickleball game.
  • 11:51 🏓 Hit to better players, focus on improving, practice weaknesses, and use drills to become a better pickleball player.

Written by Billy Walters
